brand_identity.name: Aetheron AI Technologies Pvt Ltd
brand_identity.vibe: Lockheed Martin × Tesla × OpenAI × Cyberpunk Minimalism
brand_identity.description: An advanced AI and machine intelligence company building the infrastructure of the future.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles and hero text. Tracking tight (-0.02em to -0.05em).

body.usage: Use for paragraphs and descriptions. Tracking normal or wide for small text.

mono.usage: Use for data points, coordinates, and technical specs.

visual_enhancers.cursor: Custom 'Ring' cursor. Silver outline (1px), transparent center. Expands and snaps on hover.
visual_enhancers.glitch_effect: On text reveal: slight RGB shift or opacity flicker.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Backdrop blur (12px) + 1px white/10 border. No shadows.
visual_enhancers.noise: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on backgrounds to prevent banding.

hero.structure: Full screen (h-screen). Text overlay: Bottom-Left or Center-Left. Background: Spline 3D Scene.

project_showcase.structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 gap-6. Mix of video previews, static imagery, and data cards.

about.visual: Abstract tech imagery or wireframe renders.

features.structure: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3. Large icons (thin stroke), minimal text.
features.icons: Lucide React (Globe, Cpu, Zap, Network, Shield, Brain).

components.name: SplineBackground
components.instructions: Ensure it is lazy loaded. Use a placeholder div while loading.

components.name: CustomCursor
components.instructions: Global custom cursor. Hide default cursor. Circle shape. Mix-blend-mode: difference (optional).

components.name: LoadingScreen
components.instructions: Black background. Progress bar thin line (1px). Count up percentage (JetBrains Mono). Glitch effect on logo.

image_assets.feature_icons: Use Lucide-React icons. No images needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: npm install framer-motion @splinetool/react-spline @studio-freight/lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
Configure Tailwind: Add 'Manrope', 'Inter', 'JetBrains Mono' to font families. Add colors (surface, accent).
Global CSS: Set body bg-black, text-white. Add .no-cursor class to body when custom cursor is active.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling in App.js or main layout.
Create the 'LoadingScreen' component first. It should mount, play for 2-3s, then unmount revealing the Hero.
Use the provided Unsplash URLs for the project showcase cards.
Ensure the Spline scene is behind the Hero text (z-0) and text is z-10.
For the 'Tracing Beam' effect on cards, use a pseudo-element with a conic-gradient or framer-motion moving div.

universal_guidelines.design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.
universal_guidelines.dark_mode: Forced Dark Mode for this specific brand.
